signals.reasoning: Cover the live TAO short immediately. The trade has gone from a winner to a live loss again, retained none of peak P&L, and the urgent warning makes the short indefensible on this timeframe.
BTC is constructive, but the active veto keeps benchmark exposure in watch mode rather than action mode.
ETH is one of the better constructive names on the board, but veto keeps it watch-only rather than buyable.
SOL is too mixed to justify action while the event brake is active.
VVV lacks enough structural edge to justify action here.
BLAST has a strong squeeze-style profile on paper, but the market quality is too poor to trust as a fresh long under veto conditions.
BABY remains too catalyst-distorted and too thin to justify a fresh trade here.
LIT has momentum, but not enough clean edge to justify a fresh trade.
STBL remains a clean bearish fade because funding is strongly positive, crowding is high, and the upside still looks fragile.
DASH remains a decent watch-only long, but veto keeps it out of the buy bucket.
CHILLGUY remains extended and crowded, which keeps it below the threshold for action under veto.
